name: Pepper Spice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order listed in your bread machine or on a clean work surface.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. If using a manual mixer, mix until dough forms.
4. After the first kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
5. Place each portion into small loaf pans and cover them.
6. Let the dough rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
